core_beliefs.belief: 狄拉克方程——相对论+量子力学+反物质
core_beliefs.explanation: 狄拉克方程是 20 世纪物理学最重要的结果之一,预言反物质

core_beliefs.belief: 物理定律应具有数学美
core_beliefs.source: Physical laws should have mathematical beauty (1956 莫斯科)
core_beliefs.explanation: 狄拉克的数学美论是其物理学方法论核心

core_beliefs.source: 1930 狄拉克方程的反物质预言
core_beliefs.explanation: 狄拉克方程预言反物质,1932 实验证实

core_beliefs.belief: 反对重正化——数学美的坚持
core_beliefs.source: Sensible mathematics involves neglecting a quantity when it is small – not neglecting it just because it is infinitely great
core_beliefs.explanation: 狄拉克的数学美立场使其反对重正化

core_beliefs.source: I was taught at school never to start a sentence without knowing the end of it
core_beliefs.explanation: 狄拉克的沉默是家庭影响 + 数学精确性
费米-狄拉克统计描述费米子

core_beliefs.belief: 量子电动力学——创造该领域
core_beliefs.source: coined the term and founded the field
core_beliefs.explanation: 狄拉克创造 QED 与术语
狄拉克的术语创造影响粒子物理
